2605.02364.title: InfoLaw: Information Scaling Laws for Large Language Models with Quality-Weighted Mixture Data and Repetition
2605.02364.paper_summary: Upweighting high-quality data in LLM pretraining often improves performance, but in datalimited regimes, especially under overtraining, stronger upweighting increases repetition and can degrade performance. However, standard scaling laws do not reliably extrapolate across mixture recipes or under repetitions, making the selection for optimal data recipes at scaling underdetermined. To solve this, we introduce InfoLaw (Information Scaling Laws), a data-aware scaling framework that predicts loss from consumed tokens, model size, data mixture weights, and repetition. The key idea is to model pretraining as information accumulation, where quality controls information density and repetition induces scaledependent diminishing returns. We first collect the model performance after training on datasets that vary in scale, quality distribution, and repetition level. Then we build up the modeling for information so that information accurately predicts those model performance. InfoLaw predicts performance on unseen data recipes and larger scale runs (up to 7B, 425B tokens) with 0.15% mean and 0.96% max absolute error in loss, and it extrapolates reliably across overtraining levels, enabling efficient data-recipe selection under varying compute budgets.
2605.02364.paper_summary_zh: 提升高品質數據在LLM預訓練中的權重通常能改善性能，但在數據有限的情況下，特別是在過度訓練下，過強的提升會增加重複性並可能降低性能。<lb/>然而，標準的縮放法則在混合配方或重複下並不能可靠地外推，使得在縮放下選擇最佳數據配方變得不確定。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們引入了InfoLaw（信息縮放法則），這是一個數據感知的縮放框架，能根據消耗的標記、模型大小、數據混合權重和重複性來預測損失。<lb/>關鍵思想是將預訓練建模為信息積累，其中質量控制信息密度，而重複性會引起規模依賴的收益遞減。<lb/>我們首先收集在不同規模、質量分佈和重複水平的數據集上訓練後的模型性能。<lb/>然後我們建立信息的建模，以便信息能準確預測這些模型性能。<lb/>InfoLaw能預測未見數據配方和更大規模運行（高達7B，425B標記）的性能，損失的平均絕對誤差為0.15%和最大絕對誤差為0.96%，並且它能在過度訓練水平之間可靠地外推，使得在不同計算預算下能有效選擇數據配方。
2605.02364.author: Fengze Liu et.al.
2605.02364.authors: Fengze Liu, Weidong Zhou, Binbin Liu, Ping Guo, Zijun Wang, Bingni Zhang, Yifan Zhang, Yifeng Yu, Xiaohuan Zhou, Taifeng Wang
